'''Gurian''' was a corporation that manufactured [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]], [[Hoverbike/Legends|hoverbikes]],<ref name="TOR" /> and [[Power plant/Legends|power plant]]s, such as the [[S87 "perpetual charge" power plant dynamo]].<ref name="ISB" />

{{Company-stub}}
